wikitext:
{{Character Infobox|Necrobinder2}} {{Summon Infobox|Osty}} The {{2|Necrobinder}} is the fourth of the five characters in [[Slay the Spire 2 Wiki|Slay the Spire 2]]. She is unlocked after completing a run with the {{KW|Regent||2}}. She starts with 66 Max HP, the lowest of any character. At {{Asc|2|Ascension|2}} and above she starts with 52 HP. == Starting Loadout == === Starting Relic === {{R|Bound Phylactery||2}} - At the start of your turn, {{KW|Summon||2}} 1. Can be replaced by {{R|Phylactery Unbound||2}}. === Starting Deck === These {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder&rarity:Basic|Cards|2}} cannot be obtained through regular card rewards. * {{C|Strike (Necrobinder)|Strike|2}} x4 * {{C|Defend (Necrobinder)|Defend|2}} x4 * {{C|Bodyguard||2}} x1 * {{C|Unleash||2}} x1 === Necrobinder Cards === There are a total of 82 regular cards in Necrobinders's card pool. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Necrobinder_Skill_Common.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder&rarity:Common|Common Cards|2}} x20 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Necrobinder_Skill_Uncommon.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon Cards|2}} x36 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Necrobinder_Skill_Rare.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder&rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} x26 When playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, these cards get added to the card pool: * {{C|Legion of Bone||2}} * {{C|Glimpse Beyond||2}} There are also two cards that are not obtainable through normal means. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Necrobinder_Skill_Ancient.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder&rarity:Ancient|Ancient Cards|2}} x2
A full list of Necrobinder Cards (and more) can be found {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Necrobinder|here|2}}. == Unique Relics == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Relic |- |'''Common''' |{{R|Bone Flute||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{R|Book Repair Knife||2}}, {{R|Funerary Mask||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{R|Big Hat||2}}, {{R|Bookmark||2}}, {{R|Ivory Tile||2}} |- |'''Shop''' |{{R|Undying Sigil||2}} |} == Unique Potions == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Potion |- |'''Common''' |{{P|Potion of Doom||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{P|Bone Brew||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{P|Pot of Ghouls||2}} |} == Unlocks == The Necrobinder is unlocked by completing a run with the {{KW|Regent||2}}. This does not have to be a win. Like all characters, there are 6 Epochs in the [[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline|Timeline]] which are discovered upon reaching certain Necrobinder gameplay milestones, unlocking Cards, Relics, and Potions unique to the Necrobinder. {| class="wikitable" |+ ![[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline#The Necrobinder|Epoch]]
(Unlock Requirement) !Rewards |- |{{2|Timeline#The Twelve|The Twelve}}
(Beating Act 1) |{{C|Scourge||2}}, {{C|Countdown||2}}, {{C|Oblivion||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Futility|Futility}}
(Beating Act 2) |{{R|Bone Flute||2}}, {{R|Funerary Mask||2}}, {{R|Book Repair Knife||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Spireborn|Spireborn}}
(Beating Act 3) |{{P|Potion of Doom||2}}, {{P|Bone Brew||2}}, {{P|Pot of Ghouls||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#To Kill|To Kill}}
(Beating {{Asc|1|Ascension|2}}) |{{C|Sculpting Strike||2}}, {{C|Veilpiercer||2}}, {{C|Banshee's Cry||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#The Giant|The Giant}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Elites|Elites]]) |{{C|Afterlife||2}}, {{C|Calcify||2}}, {{C|Sacrifice||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Annihilation|Annihilation}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Bosses|Bosses]]) |{{R|Ivory Tile||2}}, {{R|Big Hat||2}}, {{R|Bookmark||2}} |} Additionally, finishing a single run with the Necrobinder, even if the run ends with a loss, will unlock the {{KW|Defect||2}} as a playable character.
